title: Your Go-to Marketplace for Deals on Used & Secondhand Items | Mercari
memory: The previous step successfully scrolled down to reveal the Shipping and Pricing sections. I have now identified all major fields, including Category, Brand, Condition options, Shipping address button, and the final List and Save draft buttons.

extract.query: Document every field, button, and section on the Mercari listing creation page. Include: 1. Current URL. 2. All input fields, dropdowns, and interactive buttons. 3. Labels and required/optional status (checking for 'required' attributes in HTML). 4. Order of fields. 5. Section names. 6. Submit button text. 7. Status of popups or login prompts. 8. Detailed photo upload area mechanics.

done.text:
I have documented the Mercari listing creation page. 

1. **URL**: https://www.mercari.com/sell/
2. **Sections and Fields (Top to Bottom)**:
   - **Photo Upload**: Label 'Add up to 12 photos' with a 'Browse Files' file input (accepts image/*) and drag-and-drop area.
   - **Product Info**:
     - **Title**: Text input, required (0/80 chars).
     - **Description**: Textarea, required (0/1000 chars, placeholder 'Describe your item (5+ words)').
     - **Category**: Custom dropdown (index 152).
     - **Brand**: Text input (index 121, placeholder 'Select brand').
     - **Condition**: Five selectable tiles: New (NWT), Like New (NWOT), Good, Fair, Poor.
   - **Shipping**:
     - **Address**: 'Add a shipping address' button.
     - **Shipping Method**: 'Prepaid label' selection.
     - **Shipping Label**: Input field (index 122), currently disabled until title/category added.
     - **Free Shipping**: Toggle/Dropdown for 'Offer buyers free shipping?' (Value: 'Yes (Recommended)').
   - **Pricing**:
     - **Item Price**: Decimal input field (min $1/max $2000).
     - **Displays**: 'You earn' ($0.00) and 'Item price' ($0.00) summary lines.
3. **Submit Buttons**: 'Save draft' (disabled) and 'List' (primary submit button).
4. **Popups/Blockers**: None currently active (promotional modal was dismissed in a previous step).
5. **Required Status**: Title, Description, and Shipping Label fields have explicit 'required' attributes in the HTML structure.
